escalation_policy: narrow the task to the smallest verifiable scope
escalation_threshold: success criteria cannot be checked with the available information
the requested action exceeds the current permission or budget
failure_escalation_policy: do not repeat the same failing path without changing inputs or method
fall back to clarification before widening scope
stop_conditions: the task remains too ambiguous to verify
the required action exceeds the allowed permission level
the available budget is exhausted before the result can be validated
success_criteria: Return the requested information relevant to the user task.
Stay within the stated scope of: Search docs for runtime context.
